rationale: One-case observed usage is 19 calls for all six methods; linear extrapolation quickly exceeds conservative caps.
SC-6 is the highest call-pressure baseline and should be deferred until accounting is validated on a small multi-case set.
PAL/PoT adds limited call pressure but introduces extra execution-path variability; defer in the first calibration checkpoint.
Run budget-4 first to stabilize call/accounting behavior, then add budget-6 in a second checkpoint.
